mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.teacher_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.course_cover, c.short_description, c.full_description, c.credit, c.category_id , c.level, c.total_hours , c.price, c.status, c.is_free, c.max_students, c.current_students, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.rating, c.rating_count, c.published_time , c.created_time, c.updated_time, cc.category_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET current_students = current_students + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND (max_students IS NULL OR max_students <= 0 OR current_students < max_students)
UPDATE course SET current_students = current_students - 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND current_students > 0
UPDATE course SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE course SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) - 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(view_count, 0) > 0
UPDATE course SET like_count = IFNULL(like_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE course SET like_count = IFNULL(like_count, 0) - 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(like_count, 0) > 0

UPDATE course SET rating = ROUND( (IFNULL(rating, 0) * IFNULL(rating_count, 0) + #{rating}) / (IFNULL(rating_count, 0) + 1), 2 ), rating_count = IFNULL(rating_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
